paper_title: MERA: Model Evolution and Routing with Skill Adaptation for Agentic Systems at Scale
status: provisional — A800 offline day 29; GRPO results n=1 seed; tau2 held-out router hurts (-9pp); new 35B joint and fullsplit results added

strongest_claims.tau2_joint_peak: 89.19% task pass at 22.16% of always-large cost (Cycle 1, joint run)
strongest_claims.tau2_small_dominates: 35B MoE 80% > GPT-5.4 71% on held-out tau2 tasks

critical_blockers: EXP-038: multi-seed GRPO (n=3) to verify +2pp claim
EXP-066: tau2 router regularization to fix held-out overfitting
EXP-039: HumanEval eval of GRPO adapter for cross-benchmark generalization
EXP-040: gold-label router evaluation to verify 93.04% claim

new_findings_2026_06_12.tau2_peak_cycle1: 89.19% task pass at 22.16% cost (joint run, 74 tasks)
new_findings_2026_06_12.tau2_router_overfits: router drops from 80% to 66% routing acc on held-out, hurts task pass 9pp
new_findings_2026_06_12.30b_sft_weak: 30B dense SFT only 12.78% Method B, 0% Method A vs 89% for 35B MoE
